Instance Property# bundleIDs

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+

```
var bundleIDs: [String] { get set }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/catapdescription/bundleids#discussion)

An Array of Strings where each String holds the bundle ID of a process to tap or exclude.
